Staff Data Scientist

EpsilonAI Montreal, QC

About the role

We are hiring a Staff Data Scientist to lead our ML platform team. You will architect scalable training pipelines and mentor junior scientists.

Requirements

  • 8+ years of industry experience in ML or data science
  • Expertise in distributed training frameworks (e.g. Ray, Horovod)
  • Strong background in statistics and experimental design
  • Experience with MLflow, Kubeflow, or equivalent experiment tracking tools

Nice to have

  • Publications at top ML venues (NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR)
  • Experience with LLM fine-tuning

Benefits

Generous equity package, comprehensive health and dental, $2,000 annual learning budget.
